title: List of Monday.com enhancements?
excerpt: Does anyone receive or able to access a list of enhancements for Monday.com (Work Platform (not CRM, etc.)?  We used to get a PDF from our MDC leads of enhancements.  I asked recently, and was directed to this link.  Thi…

posts.author: ScottC (Scott Clemmons)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone receive or able to access a list of enhancements for Monday.com (Work Platform (not CRM, etc.)? We used to get a PDF from our MDC leads of enhancements. I asked recently, and was directed to this link. This is good, but doesn’t seem comprehensive. There is also a link to enhancements for CRM, etc. But nothing for the core Work Platform.

Does anyone have access to or receive any type of monthly release notes/enhancements?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ScottC I find the New features videos really helpful as they showcase updates etc:

Help Center

New features Archives - Help Center

Discover the latest feature releases, improvements, and updates

posts.author: ScottC (Scott Clemmons)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @Clarey. I’ll try and watch one of these to see if it helps. The challenge I have is the hour it takes to watch and learn of the enhancements. My preference would be to see/read something where I can glance at the items for a few minutes, and see if there is anything of interest to dive deeper on.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is also the “What’s New” inside of your account, it’s more article based and one ‘feature’ at a time. If you click on the ? mark at the top of the page, you should see it.

image594×952 89.7 KB

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml:
So, this view is not availabe in my account anymore.
It was, though, some years ago. And those new topics that show up in your image aren’t the same as in the ‘What’s New’ Website, where they seem to be prioritising WorkCanvas over the Work Management product (which should be the core product…).

With so many missing essential features (regarding mirrored items, subitems, workflows and automations regarding them), it’s quite frustrating having new features such as ‘resizing your org chart’ in WorkCanvas.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: @Admeirel You might reach out to support, not sure why you wouldn’t see the what’s new in the account.

posts.author: ScottC (Scott Clemmons)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Clover_Gal Thanks. I checked on my end and do not see “What’s New” as an option. Here is what my screen shows upon clicking the “?”.

image525×889 54.4 KB
